OUR SERVICES

Individual hair transplant solutions

We use the most advanced DHI and Sapphire FUE technologies for a natural and lasting result

Hair Transplant - Men

Solution for baldness and receding hairline with natural results. Using DHI or Sapphire FUE methods.

Learn more →

Hair Transplant - Women

Discreet solution for thinning and hair loss in women. Delicate work for a natural look.

Beard Transplant

Full beard without gaps. Defining the line and density according to your preferences for a perfect masculine look.

Learn more →

WHY MAXHAIR

Complete care without middlemen

We are with you from the first consultation, through the procedure, to long-term care. Throughout the entire process, you are in direct contact with hair transplant specialists.

01

Czech support 24/7

We communicate with you in Czech from the first consultation, through the clinic stay and the procedure, to your return home and follow-up care.

02

5* hotel with breakfast

Accommodation in a carefully selected 5* hotel for 3 nights with breakfast is included. The hotel meets high standards for cleanliness, comfort, and tranquility, which are essential after the procedure.

03

VIP transfer

We arrange airport pickup and transportation with our private drivers to the hotel, clinic, and back. Everything is planned in advance.

04

Lifetime care

We stay in touch with you even after achieving the final result. We provide consultations, recommendations, and support whenever you need it.

05

Latest technology

We use modern DHI and Sapphire FUE methods that enable precise work, gentler healing, and natural-looking hair/beard.

06

Transparent pricing

The price is set in advance and includes all services related to the procedure. No hidden fees or additional costs.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

The procedure is performed under local anesthesia and is completely painless. You may feel slight discomfort during the first few minutes when the anesthesia is applied. After the procedure, you may feel mild pressure that quickly subsides.

The duration depends on the scope of the transplant and the number of grafts. It most commonly takes 6 to 8 hours. During the procedure, there are breaks for rest and refreshments.

The number of grafts depends on the extent of hair loss and the quality of your donor area. The estimated number is determined by the doctor based on a trichological examination. The exact graft count is known only after extraction. It most commonly ranges between 3,500–4,500 grafts.

The basic healing period lasts approximately 7–10 days. You can return to normal daily activities a few days after the procedure; we recommend postponing more intense physical activity for 4 weeks after the procedure.

The first new hairs begin to appear approximately 3–4 months after the procedure. Visible improvement in density occurs around the 6th month. The final result is usually apparent after 9–12 months, in some clients up to 12–15 months.

Yes, transplanted hair comes from the donor area at the back of the head, which is not genetically prone to hair loss. The results are therefore permanent.
